calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

ASSIGNEE LVNV FUNDING, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

There being no appearances, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

The claim of exemption is OFF CALENDAR. The Los Angeles Sheriff released the funds to the bank.

Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/ACM)
